description: Text "Perfect!" appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

description: Text "As you explore, please think out loud - tell me everything you notice, what you're thinking, and any questions that come to mind. Imagine" appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

description: Text "you just opened the app during your lunch break with 15 minutes free on your phone - explore the prototype to find opportunities that would work for that situation. Remember," appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

description: Text "we're testing the design, not you, so any confusion or friction you experience is valuable feedback!" appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

description: Text "Please think aloud as you work through this, sharing your thoughts and describing what you're seeing as you go. Let me know when you feel you've completed the task." appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

description: Text "I'm going to open the website in your browser now. If you" appears on the instruction screen.
frame_description: Dark background with white instruction text being revealed.

frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Under 10 min' button in the filter modal.

description: User adjusts the minimum pay rate from $0 to $20.
frame_description: The user increases the minimum pay rate filter.

description: Cursor hovers over the pay rate slider.
frame_description: The user pauses while looking at the pay rate settings.

description: User adjusts the maximum pay rate from $86 to $100+.
frame_description: The user increases the maximum pay rate filter to the limit.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Device' section.
frame_description: The user moves the cursor down towards the device filters.

description: User clicks to expand advanced options.
frame_description: The user clicks the advanced options section in the modal.

description: The 'ADVANCED OPTIONS' section expands.
frame_description: Additional filter options appear at the bottom of the modal.

description: User clicks the close button on the filter modal.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'X' to dismiss the filter modal.

description: The filter modal closes, sliding down.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the main opportunity list.

description: The opportunity list updates with new results based on filters.
frame_description: The list of tasks and surveys refreshes with filtered content.

description: User scrolls down the list of opportunities.
frame_description: The user browses the filtered list of opportunities.

description: User clicks the filter icon.
frame_description: The user re-opens the filter settings.

description: The filter modal opens, sliding up.
frame_description: The filter modal appears on screen again.

description: User scrolls down the list.
frame_description: The user continues browsing the opportunity list.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user pauses over a specific task card.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user's attention remains on the same task card.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user hovers over the card before moving to the navigation bar.

description: User clicks the 'Messages' tab.
frame_description: The user clicks the messages icon in the bottom navigation bar.

description: Page navigates to the Messages screen.
frame_description: The screen content changes to show the user's messages.

description: User clicks the 'Tasks' tab.
frame_description: The user clicks the tasks icon to return to the main list.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user returns their attention to the 'In Person' task.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user continues to hover over the task card.

description: User scrolls through the list of opportunities on the Explore page, browsing various cards like 'Video Call', 'In Person', and 'Diary Study'.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible, showing a list of research opportunities with different colors and icons.

description: User scrolls up.
frame_description: The user scrolls towards the top of the list.

description: Cursor hovers over an opportunity card.
frame_description: The user hovers over the 'AI Interview' task card.

description: User clicks on the filter icon located in the top right corner of the Explore page.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and clicks the filter icon in the header of the Explore page.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears, sliding up to cover the screen.
frame_description: A white modal overlay titled 'Filter Opportunities' appears over the main content.

description: User scrolls through the various filter options within the modal, including Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate, and Device.
frame_description: The user is browsing through the filter settings without making any selections.

description: User clicks the 'X' button in the top right of the filter modal to close it.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the close icon on the filter modal.

description: The filter modal closes, returning the user to the Explore opportunity list.
frame_description: The filter modal disappears, revealing the main Explore page again.

description: User continues to scroll through the opportunity list on the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is browsing the main list of opportunities again.

description: The screen transitions to a task completion message.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text appears, thanking the user and instructing them to close the task.

description: The video transitions from the app interface to a full-screen view of the participant's webcam.
frame_description: The participant, Georgie, is visible on camera, speaking to the researcher at the end of the session.
